zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanne De Dutton於大約1375年出生在英國爾哈頓時，她的父親Edmund Dutton34歲，母親Joan Minshull34歲。她於1405年與William de Horton II在英國英格蘭爾哈頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年3月22日在英國萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利享年66歲。

zh-hans.Wakefield Manor, Knaptoft, Mowsley, Leic: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾可納普托福特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanne De Dutton于大约1375年出生在英国爾哈頓时，她的父亲Edmund Dutton34岁，母亲Joan Minshull34岁。她于1405年与William de Horton II在英国英格兰爾哈頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年3月22日在英国萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanne De Dutton was born about 1375, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, her father, Edmund Dutton, was 34 and her mother, Joan Minshull, was 34. She married William de Horton II in 1405, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 22 March 1440, in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanne De Dutton est née environ 1375, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Dutton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Minshull, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé William de Horton II en 1405, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mars 1440, à Mowsley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanne De Dutton um 1375 in Hatton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Dutton 34 und ihre Mutter Joan Minshull 34. Sie hat 1405 in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William de Horton II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. März 1440 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne De Dutton è nata il circa 1375 nel Hatton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Edmund Dutton, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joan Minshull, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato William de Horton II nel 1405, nel Hatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 marzo 1440, nel Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanne De Duttonが約1375年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Edmund Duttonは34歳，母Joan Minshullは34歳であった。1405年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンでWilliam de Horton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年3月22日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアモウスリーで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanne De Dutton(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Dutton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Minshull(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 William de Horton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 3월 22일 영국 레이스스터실르 모우슬리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne De Dutton nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Dutton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Minshull, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Horton II em 1405, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de março de 1440, em Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanne De Dutton родилась около 1375 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Dutton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Minshull, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Horton II в 1405 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 марта 1440 г. в местности моусли, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanne De Dutton nació aproximadamente 1375, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Dutton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan Minshull, tenía 34 años. Se casó con William de Horton II en 1405, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1440, en Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
